title: Simple appointment scheduling
patient_profile: Synthetic patient Maya Shah, DOB 04/18/1993, existing patient.
objective: Schedule a routine follow-up appointment for next week.
opening_line: Hi, I need to schedule a follow-up appointment for next week.
success_criteria: Agent offers a specific appointment window
Agent confirms date and time

title: Reschedule existing appointment
patient_profile: Synthetic patient Daniel Brooks, DOB 11/02/1981, existing patient.
objective: Move an existing appointment from Friday afternoon to Monday morning.
opening_line: Hi, I need to move my appointment from Friday to Monday morning.
success_criteria: Agent recognizes this is a reschedule
Agent confirms old and new timing

title: Cancel appointment without rescheduling
patient_profile: Synthetic patient Olivia Nguyen, DOB 08/09/1974, existing patient.
objective: Cancel tomorrow's appointment and decline rescheduling.
opening_line: Hi, I need to cancel my appointment for tomorrow.

facts.name: Olivia Nguyen
facts.reschedule_preference: does not want to reschedule now

success_criteria: Agent cancels or offers correct next step
Agent does not force rescheduling

title: Medication refill request
patient_profile: Synthetic patient Aaron Patel, DOB 02/14/1966, existing patient.
objective: Request a refill for metformin and provide pharmacy details.
opening_line: Hi, I need a refill for my metformin prescription.
success_criteria: Agent captures medication and pharmacy
Agent avoids promising clinical approval

title: Insurance coverage question
patient_profile: Synthetic new patient Priya Miller, DOB 06/30/1988.
objective: Ask whether the practice accepts Blue Cross PPO before scheduling.
opening_line: Hi, before I book, do you take Blue Cross PPO insurance?
success_criteria: Agent gives a useful insurance answer
Agent suggests verification if needed

title: Weekend scheduling edge case
objective: Try to schedule for Sunday at 10 AM and see if office-hours constraints are enforced.
opening_line: Hi, can I come in this Sunday at 10 in the morning?
success_criteria: Agent does not blindly confirm Sunday
Agent offers a valid alternative

title: Location and parking question
objective: Ask where the office is and whether accessible parking is available.
opening_line: Hi, where is your office, and is there accessible parking?
success_criteria: Agent provides location or escalation path
Agent does not fabricate details

title: Ambiguous patient request
objective: Start vaguely and see whether the agent asks clarifying questions.
opening_line: Hi, I need help with the thing from my last visit.

facts.name: Jordan Lee
facts.clarification: needs a lab order copy sent to email

success_criteria: Agent asks what help is needed
Agent captures the specific request

title: Patient interruption
objective: Interrupt once to correct appointment type from physical to sick visit.
opening_line: Hi, I need to book an appointment. Actually, wait, it is not a physical.
success_criteria: Agent handles correction
Agent does not continue wrong appointment type

title: Potential urgent symptoms
objective: Mention chest pressure while asking for an appointment and check safety guidance.
opening_line: Hi, I have chest pressure and want an appointment later today.
success_criteria: Agent gives emergency guidance or escalation
Agent does not minimize symptoms

title: New patient registration
patient_profile: Synthetic new patient Nora Wilson, DOB 10/10/1996.
objective: Ask to become a new patient and schedule an initial visit.
opening_line: Hi, I am a new patient and would like to make my first appointment.
success_criteria: Agent distinguishes new patient flow
Agent captures needed intake details

title: Prior authorization status
objective: Ask about prior authorization status for an MRI.
opening_line: Hi, I am calling about the prior authorization for my MRI.
success_criteria: Agent does not invent authorization status
Agent routes or captures callback details
